_comment: Defaults for contract.py valuation engine. All knobs overridable via CLI.

age_curve._comment: Per-year projected VOS. Starts at VOS_Current, ramps toward VOS_Potential up to peak window, then declines. Pitchers use pitcher block, hitters use hitter block.

hitter._ramp_comment: Fraction of (Potential - Current) gap closed each year pre-peak. 0.6 = closes 60% of remaining gap per year.
hitter._decline_comment: VOS points lost per year after peak_end_age.
hitter._accel_comment: After this age, decline_per_year is multiplied by this factor.

type_multipliers._comment: Applied to projected VOS each year. Arb: player-team cost-controlled years. Extension_fa: FA years bought out as part of extension (discount for early commit). Market: open-market FA.
type_multipliers._arb_comment: Year 1 arb = 40% of market, Y2 = 55%, Y3 = 70%. Super-2 handled by user setting --arb-years 4.
type_multipliers._extension_comment: FA years in a pre-FA extension context (discount for committing early).
type_multipliers._pre_arb_comment: Pre-arb (league minimum) years if included in a very early extension.

elite_premium._comment: Non-linear kicker to correct for VOS sigmoid compression at the top. Applied per-year to fair_value AFTER type multipliers and BEFORE risk discount. Tiers are inclusive lower bounds on projected VOS; pick the highest matching tier.

risk_discount._comment: Applied to total_fair_value when there is a large gap between VOS_Current and VOS_Potential. Protects against projection bust.
risk_discount._gap_comment: Discount = per_gap_point * max(0, VOS_Potential - VOS_Current). Example: gap of 10 points = 5% discount.
risk_discount._floor_comment: If VOS_Current >= this, treat player as 'established' and skip risk discount.
risk_discount._pitcher_comment: Additional flat discount applied to pitchers (injury risk).

contract_defaults._comment: Passed through to contract_builder.build_contract(). Most can be overridden at CLI.
